title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.111 - Commission to administer all state funds
text:
644.111.  Commission to administer all state funds. — The commission is the agency for the administration of such funds which are available for assistance from the state for this program.
(L. 1972 S.B. 424, A.L. 1973 S.B. 259, S.B. 321, A.L. 1982 S.B. 646, A.L. 1987 H.B. 497, A.L. 1991 S.B. 185) 
Effective 6-18-91
